known_issues.description: Detector auto-detection resolves Electron version 3.1.0 instead of 34.5.8 due to Squirrel.framework match precedence. Fixed by using MACRUN_ELECTRON_VERSION=42.3.3.

ASAR header declares devDependencies (vitest, why-is-node-running) in app.asar.unpacked that are missing in the production DMG release, causing asar.extractAll to crash. Fixed by mocking fs in asar-extract.js to gracefully ignore missing unpacked assets.

workarounds.description: Substitute Linux-native better-sqlite3 C++ module compiled for Electron 42.3.3 to avoid platform binary crash.

notes: DeepSeek GUI runs successfully via Electron 42 runtime substitution. Pre-compiled Linux-native better-sqlite3 from Codex was reused successfully. Unpacked devDependencies packaging bug is handled gracefully via fs mock hooks in asar-extract.js.
